expo.name: VEND
expo.description: VEND - Discover hyper-local vendors and services across Nigeria. Connect with nearby businesses for instant access to products and services.
expo.author: VEND Team

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VEND needs your location to find nearby vendors and services in your area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VEND needs your location to find nearby vendors and services in your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Upload photos of products, services, or your business location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Select photos from your library to upload to your profile or listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save photos from VEND to your library.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: VEND uses tracking to provide personalized vendor recommendations and improve your experience.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: VEND may use local network to enhance location services.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow VEND to use your location to find nearby vendors.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow VEND to access your camera to take photos.
